screen_recording.purpose: Computer control needs to capture your screen to see what's visible

accessibility.purpose: Computer control needs to control your mouse and keyboard to interact with apps

file_system.purpose: Video editing, script execution, and file operations need file access

automation.purpose: Automating apps like DaVinci Resolve, Premiere, CapCut requires automation control

script_execution.purpose: Some complex automations require executing scripts directly

video_editing.purpose: Video editor agents need to control video editing software

network_access.purpose: Premium cloud models and MCP servers need network access
